description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in full-body medical protective gear, including a hooded coverall, gloves, boots, and a face mask with goggles. The suit is marked with blue stripes and features a medical insignia and Chinese characters on the back, indicating affiliation with a hospital or medical team. The figure is depicted in a dynamic running pose, with one leg forward and one arm bent at the elbow. The protective suit appears to be made of a lightweight, synthetic material, likely designed for biohazard or infectious disease environments. The gloves, boots, and mask are visually distinct, suggesting additional protective layering. The overall appearance is that of a healthcare worker or emergency responder in a high-risk urban scenario.
description: An adult in full-body medical protective gear, including a hooded suit, gloves, boots, and a face mask, depicted running. The suit features blue stripes and medical insignia, indicating a healthcare worker or responder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face mask, goggles, and the forward-running posture with one arm and leg extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, gloves, and boots, with the running motion clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the medical insignia and Chinese characters on the back of the suit, as well as the hood and back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the arm and leg positions mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body medical protective suit with hood, gloves, boots, and face mask with goggles
attribute_posture: running with one leg forward and one arm bent
